topics: Basic Elements of Discrete Data Control Systems, Advantages of Discrete Data Control Systems, Examples. Signal Conversion & Processing: Digital Signals & Coding, Data Conversion & Quantization, Sample and Hold Devices, Mathematical Modelling of the Sampling Process

Rules for Construction of Root Locus. Frequency Domain Analysis
Bode Plots - Gain Margin and Phase Margin

Conversion of Transfer Function Model to State Space Model
Solution to Discrete State Equations. Controllability and Observability
